reviews.comment:
Paramos al costado de la estación de servicio en el sector recreo del ACA, excelente lugar para comer y estirar las piernas, arbolada  mesas y bancos  parrillas  pileta para lavar, juegos de niños todo en excelentes condiciones!!!

(Translated by Google)
We stopped next to the gas station in the ACA recreation area, an excellent place to eat and stretch your legs, with trees, tables and benches, grills, a sink for washing up, and a children's playground—all in excellent condition!

reviews.comment:
Lugar limpio y atencion excelente.

(Translated by Google)
Clean place and excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKek5HOVRORzQzTXpOYVNrRTRNbHBEZDAxNVVtYxAB

reviews.comment:
Es parada forzada por ser la unica en un tramo largo de autovia.
Baños sucios, mala predisposición del bar y sin app por no ser full.
Los playeros fantásticos. Atentos y serviciales

(Translated by Google)
It's a necessary stop because it's the only one on a long stretch of highway.
Dirty restrooms, unfriendly bar staff, and no app because it's not a full-service resort. However, the beach attendants are fantastic. Attentive and helpful.

reviews.comment:
Cumple con ser una estación de servicio. Buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
It fulfills its purpose as a gas station. Good service.

reviews.comment:
Es muy chico lo que hace que sea lento el expendio de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
It's very small, which makes fuel dispensing slow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pWMWEyOURaRXRmYTNGNGFHWkZNR2hrWm1JeWEyYxAB

reviews.comment:
Cargas combustible y es parada obligatoria...Si querés comer como en casa bien pulenta... Y encima te atiendan de 10, es por acá... Genios los playeros y las chicas del servicompras. Excelente atención como siempre!

(Translated by Google)
You fill up your tank and it's a must-stop... If you want a really good, home-cooked meal... And on top of that, the service is top-notch, this is the place... The gas station attendants and the convenience store staff are fantastic. Excellent service as always!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6605327411822953876/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRcEl5eXdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Una vergüenza una estación de servicio sin cigarrillos para vender una lastima de estación de servicio

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace that a gas station doesn't have cigarettes to sell. What a shameful gas station.
